title: Vegan Golden Potato Gratin
description: A delicious, comforting gratin made with golden potatoes, perfect for a cozy evening. This vegan dish is a great alternative for those looking for a plant-based option.
instructions: Peel and slice the golden potatoes thinly.
In a large saucepan, combine the sliced potatoes, croatian olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are tender and lightly browned.
Transfer the potatoes to a 9x13 inch baking dish. Top with caramelized onions, garlic, nutritional yeast, and dried thyme.
Sprinkle the crumble evenly over the top of the gratin.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
Garnish with sliced yukon gold potatoes and serve hot.
